hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 进入美联储，面临降息问题的“家庭斗争”；【FINANCE】美联储理事米兰递交辞呈，支持沃什出任新任主席；【FINANCE】斯蒂芬·米兰退出美联储。他如何为凯文·沃什奠定了基础。。

items.title: Kevin Warsh comes into the Fed facing a big 'family fight' over cutting interest rates
items.summary: With inflation spiking and Treasury yields surging, Warsh is likely to confront a Federal Open Market Committee in no mood to ease.
items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 进入美联储，面临降息问题的“家庭斗争”
items.summary_zh: 随着通胀飙升和国债收益率飙升，沃什可能会面对没有心情放松政策的联邦公开市场委员会。

items.title: Fed Governor Miran submits resignation, throws support behind Warsh as new chair
items.summary: Miran served as a contrarian voice on the rate-setting Federal Open Market Committee.
items.title_zh: 美联储理事米兰递交辞呈，支持沃什出任新任主席
items.summary_zh: 米兰在制定利率的联邦公开市场委员会中担任逆向声音。

items.title: Stephen Miran exits the Fed. How he set the stage for Kevin Warsh.
items.summary: The outgoing Fed governor shares big ideas with the incoming chair.
items.title_zh: 斯蒂芬·米兰退出美联储。他如何为凯文·沃什奠定了基础。
items.summary_zh: 即将卸任的美联储理事与即将上任的主席分享了重要想法。

items.title: Lebanon says six killed in Israeli strike as US announces ceasefire extension
items.summary: President Trump announced the truce last month, but Israel and Hezbollah have continued to exchange fire since then.
items.title_zh: 黎巴嫩称以色列袭击造成六人死亡，美国宣布延长停火
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统上个月宣布停战，但此后以色列和真主党继续交火。

items.title: Freight train and bus crash kills at least eight in Bangkok
items.summary: Police and rescue officials said the collision sparked a fire that engulfed the bus.
items.title_zh: 曼谷货运火车和巴士相撞事故造成至少八人死亡
items.summary_zh: 警方和救援官员表示，碰撞引发大火，吞没了巴士。

items.title: Sea's View on the Future of Agentic Software Development with Codex
items.summary: Sea Limited's CPO explains why the company is deploying Codex across engineering teams to accelerate AI-native software development in Asia.
items.title_zh: Sea 对 Codex 代理软件开发未来的看法
items.summary_zh: Sea Limited 的 CPO 解释了该公司为何在工程团队中部署 Codex 以加速亚洲 AI 原生软件的开发。

items.title: Jump Crypto’s ‘Firedancer’ is taking a slow and steady approach to its long-awaited Solana infrastructure rollout
items.summary: In an interview with CoinDesk, the lead engineer at Firedancer gives an update on how the new client, also known as a software, is fairing in the Solana ecosystem.
items.title_zh: Jump Crypto 的“Firedancer”正在采取缓慢而稳定的方式来推出期待已久的 Solana 基础设施
items.summary_zh: 在接受 CoinDesk 采访时，Firedancer 的首席工程师介绍了新客户端（也称为软件）如何在 Solana 生态系统中运行的最新信息。

items.title: The $293 million KelpDAO hack shows why DeFi is finally being forced to grow up
items.summary: For protocol founders and security researchers, the incident reinforced a broader shift underway across crypto: DeFi is no longer primarily battling coding bugs. It’s battling complexity.
items.title_zh: 价值 2.93 亿美元的 KelpDAO 黑客事件揭示了 DeFi 最终被迫成长的原因
items.summary_zh: 对于协议创始人和安全研究人员来说，这一事件强化了加密领域正在发生的更广泛的转变：DeFi 不再主要与编码错误作斗争。它正在与复杂性作斗争。

items.title: XRP beat bitcoin gains as CLARITY Act advanced, but a real bullrun still needs Congress
items.summary: The token jumped 5% after a Senate committee moved the market-structure bill forward, reviving hopes that legal clarity can pull deeper institutional money into XRP products.
items.title_zh: 随着《澄清法案》的推进，XRP 击败了比特币涨幅，但真正的牛市仍需要国会
items.summary_zh: 在参议院委员会推进市场结构法案后，该代币上涨了 5%，重新燃起了人们对法律清晰度能够吸引更多机构资金投入 XRP 产品的希望。

items.title: Harvard dumps ether ETF as Abu Dhabi sovereign fund keeps adding to bitcoin positions
items.summary: Abu Dhabi-based Mubadala added over $90 million to its already sizeable position in BlackRock’s iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF.
items.title_zh: 随着阿布扎比主权基金不断增加比特币头寸，哈佛抛售以太坊 ETF
items.summary_zh: 总部位于阿布扎比的 Mubadala 在贝莱德 iShares 比特币信托 ETF 中本已相当大的头寸基础上又增加了超过 9000 万美元。

items.title: 21Shares’ Hyperliquid ETF posts ‘best day’ inflows of $5 million as Coinbase becomes treasury deployer
items.summary: The newly-launched ETF “had its best day yet" on Thursday with $8.1 million trading volume and net inflows of roughly $4.9 million.
items.title_zh: 随着 Coinbase 成为资金部署者，21Shares 的 Hyperliquid ETF 迎来了 500 万美元的“最佳日”流入
items.summary_zh: 周四，这只新推出的 ETF 迎来了“迄今为止最好的一天”，交易量为 810 万美元，净流入约为 490 万美元。

items.title: Strategy to retire $1.5 billion in convertible notes at a discount, may sell bitcoin to fund buyback
items.summary: Strategy is buying back $1.5 billion of its 2029 convertible notes for $1.38 billion, potentially selling bitcoin to fund the deal.
items.title_zh: 以折扣价收回 15 亿美元可转换票据的策略，可能会出售比特币以资助回购
items.summary_zh: Strategy 将以 13.8 亿美元的价格回购 15 亿美元的 2029 年可转换票据，并可能出售比特币来为交易提供资金。

items.title: How business operations teams use Codex
items.summary: See how business operations teams can use Codex to create initiative briefs, strategy updates, leadership decision packets, progress updates, and more from real work inputs.
items.title_zh: 业务运营团队如何使用 Codex
items.summary_zh: 了解业务运营团队如何使用 Codex 根据实际工作输入创建计划简报、战略更新、领导决策包、进度更新等。

items.title: Helping ChatGPT better recognize context in sensitive conversations
items.summary: Learn how new ChatGPT safety updates improve context awareness in sensitive conversations, helping detect risk over time and respond more safely.
items.title_zh: 帮助 ChatGPT 更好地识别敏感对话中的上下文
items.summary_zh: 了解新的 ChatGPT 安全更新如何提高敏感对话中的上下文感知，帮助随着时间的推移检测风险并更安全地做出响应。

items.title: 'Biggest bottleneck in the AI buildup' fuels DRAM ETF to record
items.summary: The Roundhill Memory ETF (DRAM) just reached $10 billion in assets at the fastest pace ever for an exchange-traded fund according to TMX VettaFi.
items.title_zh: “人工智能发展的最大瓶颈”推动 DRAM ETF 创纪录
items.summary_zh: 根据 TMX VettaFi 的数据，Roundhill Memory ETF (DRAM) 的资产刚刚以交易所交易基金有史以来最快的速度达到 100 亿美元。

items.title: NFL wants certain trading contracts banned from prediction markets like 'first play of game,' injuries
items.summary: The letter, which was reviewed by CNBC, calls for banning certain contracts and raising the age requirements for participation on sports-related contracts.
items.title_zh: NFL 希望禁止某些交易合同进入预测市场，例如“第一场比赛”、伤病等
items.summary_zh: CNBC 审阅了这封信，呼吁禁止某些合同并提高参与体育相关合同的年龄要求。

items.title: Taiwan insists it is independent after Trump warning
items.summary: Fresh from his summit in Beijing, the US president warned against a formal declaration of independence by the island.
items.title_zh: 特朗普警告后台湾坚称独立
items.summary_zh: 这位美国总统刚刚结束北京峰会，就警告台湾不要正式宣布独立。

items.title: US planning to charge ex-Cuban leader Raúl Castro
items.summary: Charges could come as soon as next week in a case reportedly focused on Cuba's downing of two planes in 1996.
items.title_zh: 美国计划起诉前古巴领导人劳尔·卡斯特罗
items.summary_zh: 据报道，针对古巴 1996 年击落两架飞机的案件，最快可能于下周提出指控。

items.title: Switzerland to open secret files on Auschwitz 'Angel of Death' Mengele
items.summary: Mengele fled Europe after the war but for years there were rumours he spent time in Switzerland.
items.title_zh: 瑞士将公开奥斯维辛集中营“死亡天使”门格勒的秘密档案
items.summary_zh: 门格勒战后逃离欧洲，但多年来一直有传言说他在瑞士度过了一段时光。

items.title: Train Crashes Into Bangkok Traffic, Killing at Least 8
items.summary: A freight train plowed into traffic on train tracks, starting a fire. The authorities did not immediately give a cause but said a barrier had not come down.
items.title_zh: 火车冲入曼谷交通，造成至少 8 人死亡
items.summary_zh: 一列货运列车冲入铁轨上，引发火灾。当局没有立即给出原因，但表示障碍尚未拆除。

items.title: Crypto users are choosing juicy yields over protection, putting billions at risk of hacks
items.summary: DeFi insurance protocols debuted with huge ambitions during the 2020 crypto boom. But as hacks evolved and users chased yields over protection, most of the sector collapsed under the same risks it was built to cover.
items.title_zh: 加密货币用户选择丰厚的收益而不是保护，使数十亿人面临黑客攻击的风险
items.summary_zh: DeFi 保险协议在 2020 年加密货币热潮期间首次亮相，雄心勃勃。但随着黑客的发展以及用户追逐收益而不是保护，该行业的大部分都在其旨在应对的相同风险下崩溃了。

items.title: SpaceX targets June 11 IPO pricing, picks Nasdaq for historic market debut
items.summary: Elon Musk’s rocket and satellite company has accelerated plans for its blockbuster public offering, with trading expected to begin as early as June 12 after a faster-than-expected SEC review.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 的目标是 6 月 11 日 IPO 定价，选择纳斯达克进行历史性的上市
items.summary_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 旗下的火箭和卫星公司已加快其大规模公开发行计划，在 SEC 审查速度快于预期后，预计交易最早将于 6 月 12 日开始。

items.title: Celebrating 20 years of Google Translate: Fun facts, tips and new features to try
items.summary: Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.

items.summary_zh: 谷歌分享 20 个有趣的事实来庆祝谷歌翻译成立 20 周年，从 2006 年的人工智能实验到如今支持近 250 种语言。

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.

items.summary_zh: 助理教授 Gabriele Farina 挖掘复杂多智能体场景中决策的基础。

items.title: The MIT-IBM Computing Research Lab launches to shape the future of AI and quantum computing
items.summary: Building on a long-standing MIT–IBM collaboration, the new lab will chart the convergence of AI, algorithms, and quantum computing.
items.title_zh: MIT-IBM 计算研究实验室成立，塑造人工智能和量子计算的未来
items.summary_zh: 新实验室建立在 MIT 与 IBM 长期合作的基础上，将绘制人工智能、算法和量子计算的融合图。

items.title: Crypto longs lose $500 million as bitcoin slides to $78,000, SOL and XRP down 5%
items.summary: A long-skewed liquidation cascade flushed leverage across the major tokens overnight, with the move tracking a global bond selloff and the worst session for U.S. stocks since March.
items.title_zh: 比特币跌至 78,000 美元，加密货币多头损失 5 亿美元，SOL 和 XRP 下跌 5%
items.summary_zh: 长期倾斜的清算级联在一夜之间冲垮了主要代币的杠杆率，此举追踪了全球债券抛售以及美国股市自 3 月份以来最糟糕的交易日。

items.title: Bhutan ‘doesn’t recall’ selling any bitcoin, disputing widely-tracked $1 billion BTC drawdown
items.summary: Arkham Intelligence data shows that over $1 billion in bitcoin has left wallets attributed to Bhutan in the past year, flowing to exchanges and trading firms. The country says it has not sold any.
items.title_zh: 不丹“不记得”出售过任何比特币，对广泛关注的 10 亿美元比特币提款提出异议
items.summary_zh: Arkham Intelligence 的数据显示，去年有超过 10 亿美元的比特币离开了不丹的钱包，流向了交易所和贸易公司。该国表示尚未出售任何产品。

items.title: Databricks brings GPT-5.5 to enterprise agent workflows
items.summary: Databricks uses GPT-5.5 for enterprise agent workflows after the model set a new state of the art on the OfficeQA Pro benchmark.
items.title_zh: Databricks 将 GPT-5.5 引入企业代理工作流程
items.summary_zh: 在该模型在 OfficeQA Pro 基准测试中树立了新的技术水平后，Databricks 将 GPT-5.5 用于企业代理工作流程。

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图
items.summary_zh: 该公司由 Jake Donoghue 博士 '19 和前麻省理工学院研究员 Jarrett Revels 创立，正在创建一个人工智能驱动的平台来帮助诊断和治疗疾病。

items.title: Making the case for curiosity-driven science
items.summary: President Sally Kornbluth spoke in front of a packed crowd about growing challenges to the U.S. research ecosystem as funding for America’s top research universities becomes increasingly strained.
items.title_zh: 为好奇心驱动的科学提供理由
items.summary_zh: 萨莉·科恩布鲁斯校长在拥挤的人群面前发表讲话，谈到随着美国顶尖研究型大学的资金日益紧张，美国研究生态系统面临着日益严峻的挑战。

items.title: Solving the “Whac-a-mole dilemma”: A smarter way to debias AI vision models
items.summary: A new debiasing technique called WRING avoids creating or amplifying biases that can occur with existing debiasing approaches.
items.title_zh: 解决“打地鼠困境”：消除人工智能视觉模型偏差的更智能方法
items.summary_zh: 一种名为 WRING 的新去偏技术可避免产生或放大现有去偏方法可能出现的偏差。

items.title: Why Taiwan became the defining issue in the Trump-Xi talks
items.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump had said arms sales to Taiwan would be on the agenda for his talks with Chinese President Xi Jinping which ended Friday.
items.title_zh: 为什么台湾成为特习会谈的决定性问题
items.summary_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，对台军售将列入他与中国国家主席习近平周五结束的会谈议程。

items.title: Berkshire Hathaway returns to airlines with $2.6 billion stake in Delta Air Lines
items.summary: The Omaha-based company built a position worth more than $2.6 billion, making Delta Berkshire's 14th-largest holding at the end of March.
items.title_zh: 伯克希尔哈撒韦公司以 26 亿美元持有达美航空股份重返航空公司
items.summary_zh: 截至 3 月底，这家总部位于奥马哈的公司持有价值超过 26 亿美元的头寸，成为达美伯克希尔公司的第 14 大持仓。

items.title: Bill Ackman built Microsoft stake in first quarter during sell-off, betting on AI and cloud growth
items.summary: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square Capital Management has built a position in Microsoft, the billionaire hedge fund manager said Friday in a post on X.
items.title_zh: 比尔·阿克曼（Bill Ackman）在第一季度抛售期间增持了微软股份，押注人工智能和云计算增长
items.summary_zh: 亿万富翁对冲基金经理比尔·阿克曼 (Bill Ackman) 的潘兴广场资本管理公司 (Pershing Square Capital Management) 已在微软建仓，这位亿万富翁对冲基金经理周五在 X 上发帖称。

items.title: Trump-Xi summit: The 3 big takeaways from historic meeting in Beijing
items.summary: The two-day meeting wrapped up Friday, setting the tone for further U.S.-China talks this year.
items.title_zh: 特习会：北京历史性会晤的三大收获
items.summary_zh: 为期两天的会议于周五结束，为今年进一步的美中会谈定下了基调。

items.title: Trump leaves China after talks dominated by trade, oil and Taiwan
items.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump traveled to China this week for two days of meetings with Chinese President Xi Jinping, after a year of heightened trade tensions.
items.title_zh: 特朗普在以贸易、石油和台湾为主导的会谈后离开中国
items.summary_zh: 经过一年的贸易紧张局势加剧后，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普本周前往中国与中国国家主席习近平举行了为期两天的会晤。

items.title: Senior IS leader killed in joint operation, US and Nigeria say
items.summary: President Donald Trump said the operation eliminated "the most active terrorist in the world", Abu-Bilal al-Minuki.
items.title_zh: 美国和尼日利亚称“伊斯兰国”高级领导人在联合行动中被杀
items.summary_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统表示，这次行动消灭了“世界上最活跃的恐怖分子”阿布·比拉尔·米努基。

items.title: Rescue diver dies during search for bodies of Italians who drowned in Maldives caves
items.summary: Staff Sgt Mohamed Mahdhee died while diving in the search-and-rescue operation, the Maldives government tells the BBC.
items.title_zh: 救援潜水员在寻找在马尔代夫洞穴中溺水的意大利人尸体时死亡
items.summary_zh: 马尔代夫政府告诉英国广播公司，上士穆罕默德·马赫迪在搜救行动中潜水时死亡。

items.title: Whale found dead near Danish island after German rescue operation
items.summary: Wildlife experts had previous criticised the operation, saying it would only cause the animal more distress.
items.title_zh: 德国救援行动后在丹麦岛附近发现鲸鱼死亡
items.summary_zh: 野生动物专家此前批评了这一行动，称这只会给动物带来更多痛苦。

items.title: Toddlers among more than 50 schoolchildren kidnapped in Nigeria
items.summary: No group has yet claimed responsibility for the attacks, which have devastated Mussa town in Borno state.
items.title_zh: 尼日利亚 50 多名学童中的幼儿被绑架
items.summary_zh: 目前还没有任何组织声称对这些袭击负责，这些袭击摧毁了博尔诺州穆萨镇。

items.title: Man killed by 13ft shark in Western Australia
items.summary: The attack occurred at Horseshoe Reef - north-west of the popular Rottnest Island near the city of Perth, local police say.
items.title_zh: 男子在西澳大利亚被 13 英尺长的鲨鱼杀死
items.summary_zh: 当地警方称，袭击发生在马蹄礁 - 珀斯市附近受欢迎的罗特尼斯岛西北部。

items.title: How a Nature Cruise Turned Into a Nightmare
items.summary: The hantavirus outbreak on the MV Hondius set off alarms for a world still traumatized by Covid. For those on board, the danger was much closer.
items.title_zh: 自然巡游如何变成一场噩梦
items.summary_zh: MV Hondius 号上爆发的汉坦病毒给仍饱受新冠创伤的世界敲响了警钟。对于船上的人来说，危险更近了。

items.title: Fears Grow That Iran May Be Using Proxy Groups Beyond Mideast
items.summary: The charges against Mohammad al-Saadi in the United States have raised concerns that Iran could be working with its proxies to stage attacks outside the region.
items.title_zh: 人们越来越担心伊朗可能在中东以外地区利用代理组织
items.summary_zh: 美国对穆罕默德·萨阿迪的指控引发了人们的担忧，即伊朗可能与其代理人合作，在该地区之外发动袭击。

items.title: Rival Protests Take Place in London, With a Major Security Effort
items.summary: The police have deployed thousands of officers, partly to keep far-right and pro-Palestinian marchers apart. The events drew tens of thousands to London.
items.title_zh: 伦敦发生了激烈的抗议活动，并采取了重大安全措施
items.summary_zh: 警方部署了数千名警员，部分原因是为了将极右翼和亲巴勒斯坦游行者分开。这些活动吸引了数万人前往伦敦。

items.title: Trump Uses Taiwan Arms Sales as Bargaining Chip With China, in a Risky Move
items.summary: The president said a potential arms deal for Taiwan was a “very good negotiating chip” in talks with Beijing. His words raise questions about the reliability of U.S. support.
items.title_zh: 特朗普利用台湾军售作为与中国讨价还价的筹码，这是一个危险的举动
items.summary_zh: 总统表示，对台湾的潜在武器交易是与北京谈判的“非常好的谈判筹码”。他的言论引发了人们对美国支持可靠性的质疑。

items.title: They Fled to Safety in Palestinian Territory, Then Settlers Attacked Again
items.summary: Violent settlers are not merely clearing Palestinians from land under Israel’s control. They are attacking areas where Israel agreed to Palestinian self-governance.
items.title_zh: 他们逃到巴勒斯坦领土的安全地带，然后定居者再次袭击
items.summary_zh: 暴力定居者不仅仅是将巴勒斯坦人从以色列控制下的土地上清除。他们正在攻击以色列同意巴勒斯坦自治的地区。

items.title: Hamas’s Top Leader in Gaza Is Killed in Israeli Strike
items.summary: Izz al-Din al-Haddad took over the group’s military wing in Gaza last year. Hamas officials confirmed Mr. al-Haddad’s death in an Israeli attack.
items.title_zh: 哈马斯加沙最高领导人在以色列袭击中丧生
items.summary_zh: 伊兹·丁·哈达德去年接管了该组织在加沙的军事部门。哈马斯官员证实哈达德在以色列袭击中死亡。

items.title: China Will Host Putin, Days After Trump’s Visit
items.summary: The Russian leader will go to Beijing on Tuesday for talks with President Xi Jinping. The Kremlin said he had watched President Trump’s visit closely.
items.title_zh: 特朗普访问几天后，中国将接待普京
items.summary_zh: 俄罗斯领导人将于周二前往北京与习近平主席举行会谈。克里姆林宫表示，他密切关注特朗普总统的访问。

items.title: Trump Says a Top ISIS Leader Was Killed in a U.S.-Nigerian Mission
items.summary: Abu Bilal al-Minuki, said to be the Islamic State’s second-ranking leader, was killed after a helicopter-borne assault by commandos from both countries on Friday night, two U.S. officials said.
items.title_zh: 特朗普称伊斯兰国一名高级领导人在美国-尼日利亚执行任务中被杀
items.summary_zh: 两名美国官员称，据称伊斯兰国二号头目阿布·比拉尔·米努基 (Abu Bilal al-Minuki) 在周五晚上两国突击队的直升机袭击中身亡。

items.title: It’s Been a Wild Week in British Politics. What Happens Next?
items.summary: No one has challenged Prime Minister Keir Starmer for the leadership — yet. But one rival has a path to Downing Street, and another says he’ll join the fray if there is one.
items.title_zh: 这是英国政坛疯狂的一周。接下来会发生什么？
items.summary_zh: 目前还没有人挑战总理基尔·斯塔默的领导地位。但一位竞争对手有一条通往唐宁街的道路，另一位则表示，如果有一条道路，他将加入战斗。

items.title: U.S. House lawmakers who oversee the CFTC are urging Trump to fill the commission
items.summary: As the Commodity Futures Trading Commission takes on a growing task to police U.S. crypto trading, senior lawmakers are saying it needs bipartisan leadership.
items.title_zh: 负责监督商品期货交易委员会的美国众议院议员敦促特朗普填补该委员会的空缺
items.summary_zh: 随着商品期货交易委员会承担着越来越多的监管美国加密货币交易的任务，高级立法者表示，它需要两党的领导。

items.title: Saudi Arabia is tokenizing its multi-trillion dollar economy to protect its wealth from global shocks
items.summary: The chairman of droppRWA has secured $12.5 billion in mandates to tokenized real estate and his plans are to go beyond properties to bring trillions of dollars onchain.
items.title_zh: 沙特阿拉伯正在对其数万亿美元的经济进行代币化，以保护其财富免受全球冲击
items.summary_zh: droppRWA 董事长已获得 125 亿美元的代币化房地产授权，他的计划不仅限于房地产，还将数万亿美元带入链上。

items.title: Lombard joins LayerZero exodus as $4 billion in assets switch to Chainlink's bridge
items.summary: The shift comes after the Kelp DAO exploit drained $292 million from its LayerZero-powered bridge, increasing concerns over the security of cross-chain infrastructure.
items.title_zh: 随着 40 亿美元资产转移到 Chainlink 桥上，Lombard 也加入了 LayerZero 的大逃亡行列
items.summary_zh: 这一转变是在 Kelp DAO 漏洞从其 LayerZero 驱动的桥上损失了 2.92 亿美元之后发生的，这增加了人们对跨链基础设施安全性的担忧。

items.title: Crypto market structure bill still faces significant hurdles despite Senate committee win: analysts
items.summary: TD Cowen raised the probability of the bill passing to 40% from 33% while Benchmark said the Clarity Act will need more Democratic support.
items.title_zh: 尽管参议院委员会获胜，加密货币市场结构法案仍面临重大障碍：分析师
items.summary_zh: TD Cowen 将该法案通过的可能性从 33% 提高到 40%，而 Benchmark 则表示《澄清法案》需要更多民主党支持。

items.title: It’s a ‘new era’ for crypto users who ‘trade anything and everything’ as Jito goes consumer, CEO Bruder says
items.summary: Jito founder Lucas Bruder told The Block that there's a new class of users coming onchain who "want to trade anything and everything."
items.title_zh: 首席执行官布鲁德表示，随着 Jito 走向消费者，对于加密货币用户来说，这是一个“新时代”，他们可以“交易任何东西”
items.summary_zh: Jito 创始人卢卡斯·布鲁德 (Lucas Bruder) 告诉 The Block，链上出现了一批新用户，他们“想要交易任何东西”。

items.title: Hyperliquid Policy Center argues onchain perps offer efficiency, transparency as ICE and CME reportedly press for CFTC oversight
items.summary: Bloomberg reported that ICE and CME are pressing for Hyperliquid to register with the CFTC, raising concerns about market stability.
items.title_zh: 据报道，ICE 和 CME 敦促 CFTC 进行监督，超流动性政策中心认为链上永续机构提供了效率和透明度
items.summary_zh: 彭博社报道称，ICE 和 CME 正在敦促 Hyperliquid 在 CFTC 注册，引发了对市场稳定性的担忧。

items.title: OpenSea CMO sees tokenized Pokémon cards, Rolexes and tickets driving next NFT wave
items.summary: OpenSea's Adam Hollander sees advancements in AI making it easier for people to make innovative tokenized assets.
items.title_zh: OpenSea CMO 看到代币化的神奇宝贝卡、劳力士和门票推动下一波 NFT 浪潮
items.summary_zh: OpenSea 的 Adam Hollander 认为人工智能的进步使人们更容易创建创新的代币化资产。

items.title: Poland passes MiCA crypto bill as $96 million Zondacrypto probe deepens: report
items.summary: Polish lawmakers adopted MiCA as prosecutors probe $96 million in losses from collapsed exchange Zondacrypto.
items.title_zh: 随着 9600 万美元的 Zondacrypto 调查深入，波兰通过了 MiCA 加密法案：报告
items.summary_zh: 随着检察官调查 Zondacrypto 交易所倒闭造成的 9600 万美元损失，波兰立法者采用了 MiCA。

items.title: Dogecoin has ‘crazy things on the horizon’ as ecosystem grows beyond Elon Musk, says DogeOS founder

items.title_zh: DogeOS 创始人表示，随着生态系统的发展超越埃隆·马斯克，狗狗币“即将出现疯狂的事情”
items.summary_zh: DogeOS 创始人兼首席执行官乔丹·杰斐逊 (Jordan Jefferson) 表示，狗狗币正在不断发展，不再依赖这位有时颇具争议的亿万富翁。

items.title: Study: Firms often use automation to control certain workers’ wages
items.summary: MIT economists found US companies tend to target employees earning a “wage premium,” which increases inequality but not necessarily productivity.
items.title_zh: 研究：公司经常使用自动化来控制某些工人的工资
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的经济学家发现，美国公司倾向于以赚取“工资溢价”的员工为目标，这会增加不平等，但不一定会提高生产率。

items.title: Improving understanding with language
items.summary: MIT senior Olivia Honeycutt investigates how the ways we communicate can shape our views of the world.
items.title_zh: 通过语言提高理解力
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院大四学生奥利维亚·霍尼卡特研究了我们的沟通方式如何塑造我们的世界观。
